tools.name: sequence_create
tools.description: Create an email sequence with multiple steps and delay intervals.

delay_seconds.description: Delay before sending this step (in seconds)

body_prompt.description: Prompt or body text for this step

reply_to_thread.description: Whether to reply in the existing thread (default true for step 2+)

require_approval.description: Whether to require user approval before sending (default false)

exit_on_reply.description: Whether to stop the sequence when the contact replies (default true)

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_list
tools.description: List all email sequences with their status and enrollment counts.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_get
tools.description: Get detailed information about a sequence including steps, enrollment counts, and status breakdown.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_update
tools.description: Update a sequence's name, description, status, steps, or exit-on-reply setting.

exit_on_reply.description: Whether to exit on contact reply

delay_seconds.description: Delay before sending this step (in seconds)

body_prompt.description: Prompt or body text for this step

reply_to_thread.description: Whether to reply in the existing thread

require_approval.description: Whether to require user approval before sending

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_delete
tools.description: Delete a sequence and cancel all its active enrollments.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_enroll
tools.description: Enroll one or more contacts into a sequence. Accepts comma-separated emails or an array.

sequence_id.description: Sequence ID to enroll contacts in

emails.description: Email address(es) to enroll — comma-separated string or array

context.description: Optional context object with personalization variables for the enrolled contacts

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_enrollment_list
tools.description: List enrollments for a sequence, optionally filtered by status.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_pause
tools.description: Pause a sequence (stops processing all enrollments) or cancel a specific enrollment.

enrollment_id.description: Specific enrollment ID to cancel (alternative to pausing whole sequence)

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_resume
tools.description: Resume a paused sequence. Active enrollments will be processed on the next scheduler tick.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a specific enrollment, removing the contact from the sequence.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_import
tools.description: Import contacts from a CSV/TSV file and enroll them in a sequence. First call shows a preview; set auto_enroll=true to enroll.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the CSV/TSV file

sequence_id.description: Sequence ID to enroll contacts in

auto_enroll.description: Set to true to enroll contacts (default false = preview mode)

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: sequence_analytics
tools.description: View sequence analytics dashboard with send/reply/completion metrics, per-step funnel, and recent activity.

sequence_id.description: Optional sequence ID for detailed step funnel view

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
